---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or enhancement
title: "feat: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## User Story

> As a **[type of user]**
> I want to **[goal]**
> So that **[benefit / value]**

## Acceptance Criteria

> **Given** [initial context]
> **When** [action taken]
> **Then** [expected outcome]

Add further `Given/When/Then` scenarios as needed.

## Motivation

Why is this feature valuable? What problem does it solve, and for whom?

## Proposed Solution

A description of how you imagine this working (API shape, CLI flags, endpoints).

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional Context

Links to the relevant ISO 20022 specification, related issues, or examples.
